post.topic: Claude API optimization techniques for better performance and cost efficiency
post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will save you time and money 💰
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will save you time and money 💰

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: Claude API Performance Hacks
slides.subtitle: Optimize your AI integrations like a pro

slides.title: Stream Responses for Speed
slides.body: Get partial responses as they generate instead of waiting for completion. Perfect for chat interfaces and long responses.
slides.code_snippet:
stream = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
    stream=True
)

slides.title: Use System Messages Wisely
slides.body: System messages set behavior without counting toward conversation history. They're processed more efficiently than user messages.
slides.code_snippet:
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    system="You are a helpful coding assistant",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": query}]
)

slides.title: Implement Smart Token Counting
slides.body: Count tokens before sending to avoid surprises. Use the anthropic library's built-in counting for accuracy.

slides.title: Cache Conversation Context
slides.body: Store conversation history locally to reduce API calls. Only send necessary context for each new message.
slides.code_snippet:
# Store conversation state
conversation = []
conversation.append({"role": "user", "content": msg})
conversation.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response})

slides.title: Want More Claude Tips?
slides.body: Follow @askclaude for daily AI development insights and save this post for later!
